mapper.sql: id, name, slug, tag_name, description, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM community_board WHERE slug = #{slug} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM community_board WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM community_board WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT b.id, b.name, b.slug, b.tag_name AS tagName, b.description, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM community_post p WHERE p.board_id = b.id AND p.status = 1 ) AS topicCount, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM community_post p WHERE p.board_id = b.id AND p.status = 1 AND p.published_at >= #{todayStart} ) AS todayPostCount, COALESCE(( SELECT p.title FROM community_post p WHERE p.board_id = b.id AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.is_pinned DESC, p.published_at DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT 1 ), '暂无帖子') AS latestPostTitle, ( SELECT p.published_at FROM community_post p WHERE p.board_id = b.id AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.is_pinned DESC, p.published_at DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latestPublishedAt FROM community_board b WHERE b.status = 1 ORDER BY b.sort_order ASC, b.id ASC

SELECT b.id, b.name, b.slug, b.tag_name AS tagName, b.description, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM community_post p WHERE p.board_id = b.id AND p.status = 1 ) AS topicCount, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM community_post p WHERE p.board_id = b.id AND p.status = 1 AND p.published_at >= #{todayStart} ) AS todayPostCount, COALESCE(( SELECT p.title FROM community_post p WHERE p.board_id = b.id AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.is_pinned DESC, p.published_at DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT 1 ), '暂无帖子') AS latestPostTitle, ( SELECT p.published_at FROM community_post p WHERE p.board_id = b.id AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.is_pinned DESC, p.published_at DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latestPublishedAt FROM community_board b WHERE b.id = #{id} AND b.status = 1 LIMIT 1
